params: SEARCH FLAGS(no_segment) MonitoredDevice,OptimizeSystem,Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer SHOW  lower(     (     (split(device_dns_name, '.')[0] OR device_dns_name)     OR (split(HOSTNAME, '.')[0] OR HOSTNAME)     OR (         (split(local_fqdn, '.')[0] OR local_fqdn)         OR (split(sysname, '.')[0] OR sysname)         OR (split(guest_full_name, '.')[0] OR guest_full_name)         OR (split(name, '.')[0] OR name)         )     ) ),  'ITOM' PROCESSWITH unique(0)

SEARCH FLAGS(no_segment) MonitoredDevice,OptimizeSystem,Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer WHERE          device_dns_name has substring '.'     OR HOSTNAME has substring '.'     OR local_fqdn has substring '.'     OR sysname has substring '.'     OR guest_full_name has substring '.'     OR name has substring '.' SHOW  lower((     device_dns_name     OR HOSTNAME     OR (         local_fqdn         OR sysname         OR guest_full_name         OR name         ) )), lower(     (     (split(device_dns_name, '.')[0] OR device_dns_name)     OR (split(HOSTNAME, '.')[0] OR HOSTNAME)     OR (         (split(local_fqdn, '.')[0] OR local_fqdn)         OR (split(sysname, '.')[0] OR sysname)         OR (split(guest_full_name, '.')[0] OR guest_full_name)         OR (split(name, '.')[0] OR name)         )     ) ) PROCESSWITH unique(0)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
 
  CASE WHEN CS.Name LIKE '%.%' then Lower(CS.Name) else null end as Full,
  CASE WHEN CS.Name LIKE '%.%' then Lower(SubStr(CS.Name, 0, CHARINDEX('.', CS.Name + '.') - 2)) else null end as Name

FROM 
  `AST:BaseElement` CS
 
WHERE 
  CS.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET' and CS.`Mark As Deleted` <> 'Yes'

SELECT
 
  CASE WHEN CS.Name LIKE '%.%' then Lower(SubStr(CS.Name, 0, CHARINDEX('.', CS.Name + '.') - 2)) else Lower(CS.Name) end as Name

FROM 
  `AST:BaseElement` CS
 
WHERE 
  CS.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET' and CS.`Mark As Deleted` <> 'Yes'

options.content: $fullyqualified

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
          BE.Name AS FullyQualified,
          CS.`DNS Host Name` AS `Name`,
          CS.`Domain` AS `Domain_Name`,
          BE.Building as `Site`,
          BE.`Cost Center` AS CostCenter,
          BE.`Owner_name` AS Owner,
          BE.`Purchase Date` AS Purchased,
          BE.AssetLifecycleStatus AS Status,
          BE.Company AS Company,
          BE.LastScanDate as LastScanDate,
          BE.UserDisplayObjectName as Device_Type,
          BE.`Reconciliation Identity` AS ReconciliationIdentity,
          BE.`Class Id` AS ClassId
FROM `AST:BaseElement` BE LEFT OUTER JOIN `AST:ComputerSystem` CS
     ON ( BE.`Instance Id`  =  CS.`Instance Id` )

WHERE 
      BE.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET' AND 
      (BE.`Name` = $fullyqualified OR BE.Name = $shorthost) and BE.`Mark As Deleted` <> 'Yes'
  GROUP BY 
    FullyQualified,
    Name,
    Domain_Name,
    Site,
    CostCenter,
    Owner,
    Purchased,
    Status,
    Company,
    LastScanDate,
    Device_Type,
    ReconciliationIdentity,
    ClassId

params: SEARCH MonitoredDevice WHERE device_dns_name matches '$shorthost' SHOW '$shorthost', entity_id, tenant_id, 'TRUE' PROCESSWITH unique(0)
SEARCH flags(no_segment) Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer WHERE local_fqdn = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$shorthost' SHOW 'TRUE', '$shorthost'

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
CASE WHEN CS.Name LIKE '%${shorthost:text}%' then $shorthost end as Device,
CASE WHEN CS.Name LIKE '%${shorthost:text}%' then 1 end as ITSM,
CS.`Reconciliation Identity` as ReconID,
CS.`Class Id` as Class
FROM 
  `AST:BaseElement` CS

WHERE  
  CS.`Data Set Id`  = 'BMC.ASSET' AND CS.`Mark As Deleted` <> 'Yes' AND 
  (CS.Name  =  '${shorthost:text}' OR CS.Name  = '${fullyqualified:text}')

params: SEARCH OptimizeSystem WHERE BYBENCHMARK_VALUE SHOW HOSTNAME, entity_id, BYBENCHMARK_VALUE, 'TRUE' PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

search flags(no_segment) Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer WHERE local_fqdn = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$shortname' show kind(#), name, explode(#DeviceWithAddress:DeviceAddress::IPAddress.ip_addr), #ElementInLocation:Location:Location:Location.name as 'Name', #ElementInLocation:Location:Location:Location.latitude, #ElementInLocation:Location:Location:Location.longitude

sourceQuery.query: (!status:CLOSED AND !status:BLACKOUT) AND (severity:CRITICAL OR severity:MAJOR) AND (source_hostname.keyword:${fullyqualified:text} OR source_hostname.keyword:${shorthost:text})

params: SEARCH MonitoredDevice WHERE device_dns_name matches '$shorthost' SHOW (split(device_dns_name ,'.')[0] OR device_dns_name), entity_id, tenant_id

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
    HD.Status AS Status,
    HD.`Incident Number` AS IncidentNumber,
    HD.Description AS Description,
    HD.Priority AS Priority,
    HD.`Assigned Group` AS `SupportGroup`,
    HD.InstanceId AS InstanceId,
    BE.Name AS CIName,
    HD.Site AS Site,
    SIT.SiteLatitude as latitude,
    SIT.SiteLongitude as longitude
FROM `HPD:Help Desk` HD
INNER JOIN `HPD:Associations` ASSOC
    ON HD.`Incident Number` = ASSOC.`Request ID02`
INNER JOIN `AST:BaseElement` BE
    ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = ASSOC.`Request ID01` AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
LEFT OUTER JOIN `SIT:Site` SIT
    ON HD.Site = SIT.Site
WHERE
    HD.Status NOT IN ('Resolved', 'Closed', 'Canceled')
    AND (BE.Name = $fullyqualified OR BE.Name = $shorthost)

SELECT
    CHG.`Change Request Status` AS Status,
    CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` AS ChangeNumber,
    CHG.Description,
    CHG.Site AS Site,
    CHG.`InstanceId`,
    SIT.SiteLatitude as latitude,
    SIT.SiteLongitude as longitude
FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG
INNER JOIN `CHG:Associations` ASSOC
    ON CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID` = ASSOC.`Request ID02`
INNER JOIN `AST:BaseElement` BE
    ON BE.`Reconciliation Identity` = ASSOC.`Request ID01` AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
LEFT OUTER JOIN `SIT:Site` SIT
    ON CHG.Site = SIT.Site
WHERE
    CHG.Status NOT IN ('Completed', 'Closed', 'Canceled')
    AND (BE.Name = $fullyqualified OR BE.Name = $shorthost)

SELECT
  SIT.SiteLatitude as latitude,
  SIT.SiteLongitude as longitude,
  case WHEN ASSOC.`Request Type01` = 'Incident' THEN  HD.Site ELSE CHG.Site END as Site,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ASSOC.`Request Type01` = 'Incident' then 1 else 0 end) as IncidentCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ASSOC.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change' then 1 else 0 end) as ChangeCount
FROM `AST:BaseElement` BE
INNER JOIN `AST:CMDB Associations` ASSOC
  ON ASSOC.`Request ID02` = BE.`Reconciliation Identity`
 AND ASSOC.`Data_Set_ID01` = 'BMC.ASSET'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN `HPD:Help Desk` HD ON (ASSOC.`Request Type01` = 'Incident' AND ASSOC.`Request ID01` = HD.`Incident Number`)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN `CHG:Infrastructure Change` CHG ON (ASSOC.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change' AND ASSOC.`Request ID01` = CHG.`Infrastructure Change ID`)
 INNER JOIN `SIT:Site` SIT ON (SIT.Site = HD.Site or SIT.Site = CHG.Site)
WHERE
  (BE.Name = $fullyqualified OR BE.Name = $shorthost)
  AND BE.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
  AND ASSOC.`Request Type01` IN ('Infrastructure Change','Incident')
  AND not (ASSOC.`ConsolidatedStatus` in  ('Closed', 'Canceled'))
  GROUP BY latitude,longitude, Site

SELECT Name as name,
Category,
Type,
Item,
`Reconciliation Identity`
from `AST:BusinessService` where `Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'

params: SEARCH Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer WHERE local_fqdn = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$shortname' SHOW name, logical_ram, num_logical_processors, os_version PROCESSWITH displayHistory((currentTime() - 90*24*3600*10000000), currentTime(), 1)

SEARCH FLAGS(no_segment) Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer WHERE local_fqdn = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$shortname' traverse :HostedSoftware:RunningSoftware: WHERE #ElementWithDetail:SupportDetail:SoftwareDetail:SupportDetail.end_support_date AND (time(#ElementWithDetail:SupportDetail:SoftwareDetail:SupportDetail.end_support_date) < time(currentTime())) SHOW  type,  version,  formatTime(#ElementWithDetail:SupportDetail:SoftwareDetail:SupportDetail.end_support_date, "%B %Y"), kind(#) PROCESSWITH unique(0)

SEARCH FLAGS(no_segment) Host,NetworkDevice,SNMPManagedDevice,StorageDevice,Printer WHERE local_fqdn = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$fullyqualified' OR name = '$shortname'  traverse :HostedSoftware:RunningSoftware: where age_count > 1 and ((version defined and not version = "") or (build defined and not build = ""))  SHOW type, version PROCESSWITH displayHistory((currentTime() - 90*24*3600*10000000), currentTime(), 1)

sourceQuery.query:
source_hostname:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR agent_name:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR al_agent_name:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR instancename:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR
source_hostname:"${shorthost:text}" OR agent_name:"${shorthost:text}" OR al_agent_name:"${shorthost:text}" OR instancename:"${shorthost:text}"

source_hostname:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR agent_name:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR al_agent_name:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR instancename:"${fullyqualified:text}" OR
source_hostname:"${shorthost:text}" OR agent_name:"${shorthost:text}" OR al_agent_name:"${shorthost:text}" OR instancename:"${shorthost:text}"

title: One Dashboard to Rule Them All
